The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate]. # kSecMatchValidOnDate

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the validity date.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchValidOnDate: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate]. If provided, returned keys, certificates or identities are limited to those that are valid for the given date. Pass a value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFNull] to indicate the current date.
title: kSecMatchValidOnDate
